zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Bereham IV於1285年出生在英國肯特可藍別盧可時，他的父親Henry de Bereham II27歲，母親Elizabeth Colepepper27歲。他和Elizabeth Colepepper至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1349年在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Bereham IV于1285年出生在英国肯特可藍別盧可时，他的父亲Henry de Bereham II27岁，母亲Elizabeth Colepepper27岁。他和Elizabeth Colepepper至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1349年在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bereham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Boreham (Essex), Boreham Wood in Elstree (Hertfordshire), Boreham Street in Wartling (Sussex), or Boreham in Warminster (Wiltshire). The placenames in Essex, Sussex and Hertfordshire are probably named with Old English bor ‘hill’ + ham ‘homestead’. Compare Boram and Borom .

variants.name: Borom
meanings: English: variant of   Boreham  . Compare   Boram  .

variants.name: Boram
meanings: English (Essex and Kent): variant of   Boreham  . Compare   Borom   and   Borum  .

variants.name: Borum
meanings: Danish: habitational name from any of several places whose name means ‘dwelling place on the edge’.
English (North Yorkshire): variant of   Boreham  . Compare   Boram  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Bereham IV was born in 1285, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, his father, Henry de Bereham II, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Colepepper, was 27. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Colepepper. He died in 1349, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Bereham IV est né en 1285, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Bereham II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Colepepper, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Colepepper. Il est décédé en 1349, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Bereham IV 1285 in Cranbrook, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Bereham II 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Colepepper 27. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Colepepper mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Bereham IV è nato il nel 1285 nel Cranbrook, Kent, England, il suo padre, Henry de Bereham II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Colepepper, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Colepepper. Morì nel 1349, nel Cranbrook, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Bereham IVが1285年にイギリスケントクランブルークで生まれた時，父Henry de Bereham IIは27歳，母Elizabeth Colepepperは27歳であった。彼はElizabeth Colepepperとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1349年にイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Bereham IV(이)가 1285년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Bereham II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Colepepper(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Colepepper(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Bereham IV nasceu em 1285, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Bereham II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Colepepper, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Colepepper. Ele faleceu em 1349, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Bereham IV родился в 1285 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Bereham II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Colepepper, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Colepepper. Он умер в 1349 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Bereham IV nació en 1285, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Bereham II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Colepepper, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Colepepper. Murió en 1349, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
